---
subcategory : "Cloud Project"
---

# ovh_cloud_region

Retrieves information about a specific region in a public cloud project (APIv2).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "ovh_cloud_region" "gra" {
  service_name = "YYYY"
  region_name  = "GRA7"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `service_name` (String) Service name
- `region_name` (String) Region name

### Read-Only

- `name` (String) Region identifier
- `status` (String) Region status (ENABLED, MAINTENANCE, DISABLED)
- `continent` (String) Continent code
- `country` (String) Country code
- `datacenter_name` (String) Datacenter display name
- `services` (List of String) Available OpenStack services
- `availability_zones` (List of String) Availability zones in this region
